title: Asynchronous functions should not accept timeout parameters
description: This rule checks if an asynchronous function accepts timeout parameters, which might lead to incorrect handling of timeouts.
impact: Functional issues may arise due to incorrect timeout handling.
recommendation: Avoid passing timeout parameters to asynchronous functions.

compliant.description: Function does not accept timeout parameter.

why_is_this_an_issue: Accepting timeout parameters in asynchronous functions may lead to incorrect timeout handling, causing functional issues.
how_to_fix: Rewrite the function to not accept timeout parameters.
